headline: Saturday discipline: execute, don't negotiate
summary: Today you prove Saturday doesn't own you: plan three Huel meals, execute 45 minutes rowing, and start reversing your +0.05 kg/week into the -0.63 kg/week your goal demands.
details: First: eat Huel for breakfast and lunch (zero ambiguity, zero snacking). Dinner as a controlled vegan meal—no emotional eating. Second: get 45 minutes on the rowing machine today (cardio + strength, burns kJ without the snacking triggers). Third: this Saturday matters because you're currently gaining weight when you need to lose 33 kg in 52 weeks. Every weekend you don't execute is a weekend you can't get back. You have the tools (Huel, rowing machine, discipline). Use them.
